'''ronachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrangular|quadrangular]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrangular|quadrangular]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ronachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ronachithi|ronachithi]] || [[word:ronachiji|ronachiji]] || [[word:ronachishi|ronachishi]] || [[word:ronachiki|ronachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ronachuthuthu|ronachuthuthu]] || [[word:ronachujuju|ronachujuju]] || [[word:ronachushushu|ronachushushu]] || [[word:ronachukuku|ronachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ronachuthu|ronachuthu]] || [[word:ronachuju|ronachuju]] || [[word:ronachushu|ronachushu]] || [[word:ronachuku|ronachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ronachufthuf|ronachufthuf]] || [[word:ronachufjuf|ronachufjuf]] || [[word:ronachufshuf|ronachufshuf]] || [[word:ronachufkuf|ronachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ronachethe|ronachethe]] || [[word:ronacheje|ronacheje]] || [[word:ronacheshe|ronacheshe]] || [[word:ronacheke|ronacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ronachothotho|ronachothotho]] || [[word:ronachojojo|ronachojojo]] || [[word:ronachoshosho|ronachoshosho]] || [[word:ronachokoko|ronachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ronachotho|ronachotho]] || [[word:ronachojo|ronachojo]] || [[word:ronachosho|ronachosho]] || [[word:ronachoko|ronachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ronachofthof|ronachofthof]] || [[word:ronachofjof|ronachofjof]] || [[word:ronachofshof|ronachofshof]] || [[word:ronachofkof|ronachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ronachïfthïf|ronachïfthïf]] || [[word:ronachïfjïf|ronachïfjïf]] || [[word:ronachïfshïf|ronachïfshïf]] || [[word:ronachïfkïf|ronachïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ronachïfthïfthïf|ronachïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:ronachïfjïfjïf|ronachïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:ronachïfshïfshïf|ronachïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:ronachïfkïfkïf|ronachïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ronachïfthïf|ronachïfthïf]] || [[word:ronachïfjïf|ronachïfjïf]] || [[word:ronachïfshïf|ronachïfshïf]] || [[word:ronachïfkïf|ronachïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ronachïfthïf|ronachïfthïf]] || [[word:ronachïfjïf|ronachïfjïf]] || [[word:ronachïfshïf|ronachïfshïf]] || [[word:ronachïfkïf|ronachïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ronachæthæ|ronachæthæ]] || [[word:ronachæjæ|ronachæjæ]] || [[word:ronachæshæ|ronachæshæ]] || [[word:ronachækæ|ronachækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ronachathatha|ronachathatha]] || [[word:ronachajaja|ronachajaja]] || [[word:ronachashasha|ronachashasha]] || [[word:ronachakaka|ronachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ronachatha|ronachatha]] || [[word:ronachaja|ronachaja]] || [[word:ronachasha|ronachasha]] || [[word:ronachaka|ronachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ronachafthaf|ronachafthaf]] || [[word:ronachafjaf|ronachafjaf]] || [[word:ronachafshaf|ronachafshaf]] || [[word:ronachafkaf|ronachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ronachasha|ronachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ronachshësha|ronachshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ronachrosha|ronachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ronachmusha|ronachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ronachyasha|ronachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goronachnkshësha|goronachnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goronachnkrosha|goronachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goronachnkmusha|goronachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goronachnkyasha|goronachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ronanachasha|ronanachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ronanachshësha|ronanachshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ronanachrosha|ronanachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ronanachmusha|ronanachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ronanachyasha|ronanachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goronanachnkshësha|goronanachnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goronanachnkrosha|goronanachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goronanachnkmusha|goronanachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goronanachnkyasha|goronanachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:renæchasha|renæchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:renæchshësha|renæchshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:renæchrosha|renæchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:renæchmusha|renæchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:renæchyasha|renæchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorenæchnkshësha|gorenæchnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorenæchnkrosha|gorenæchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorenæchnkmusha|gorenæchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorenæchnkyasha|gorenæchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ronfachasha|ronfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ronfachshësha|ronfachshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ronfachrosha|ronfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ronfachmusha|ronfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ronfachyasha|ronfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goronfachnkshësha|goronfachnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goronfachnkrosha|goronfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goronfachnkmusha|goronfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goronfachnkyasha|goronfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
